PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?game ?attendance WHERE {

  FILTER(YEAR(?seriesDate) >= 1970 && YEAR(?seriesDate) <= 1979)
  ?series wdt:P154 ?game .
  ?game wdt:P249 ?homeTeam ; wdt:P1320 ?awayTeam ; wdt:P1337 ?attendance .
  FILTER((?homeTeam = wd:Q1508 && ?awayTeam = wd:Q2184) ||(?homeTeam = wd:Q2184 && ?awayTeam = wd:Q1508))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
